buildCommand: npx expo export --platform web && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'public','data'),dest=path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','data');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dest,f)));console.log('Data copied to dist/data');}"
